introSection: Tranan is a steel roller coaster located at Skara Sommarland in Gothenburg, Västra Götaland, Sweden. Opened in 2009, it is the only S&S Free Fly installation. The ride's track and supports were engineered by Ride Centerline. Tranan is the first "Longitudinally Spinning Suspension Roller Coaster" meaning the central frame can invert while the suspended cars remain upright, allowing for the cars to switch from one side of the track to another.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

fullText:
Tranan is a steel roller coaster located at Skara Sommarland in Gothenburg, Västra Götaland, Sweden. Opened in 2009, it is the only S&S Free Fly installation. The ride's track and supports were engineered by Ride Centerline. Tranan is the first "Longitudinally Spinning Suspension Roller Coaster" meaning the central frame can invert while the suspended cars remain upright, allowing for the cars to switch from one side of the track to another.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.
